---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, improvement, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's missing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] New scoring dimension
- [ ] Platform support (Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI)
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references.
